title: atractocarpus pseudoterminalis
intro: Atractocarpus pseudoterminalis, a plant native to Australia and New Guinea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and supporting the immune system. Atractocarpus pseudoterminalis can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, or extracts, which are traditionally used by indigenous communities in Australia and New Guinea.
